description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the rust:latest Docker image, defining variables CARGO_HOME set to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/cargo, GIT_STRATEGY fetch, and GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY none. Define three stages: info, test, and build, and a global cache for apt/, cargo/, and target/. Add an info job in the info stage that runs rustc --version then cargo --version. Add a test job in the test stage that runs cargo test --all-features. Add a build job in the build stage that runs cargo build, with no artifacts or special rules.
